etymology.description: Depicts an open space between two things (e.g., mountain walls); the top component 八 suggests separation or a gap, with 口 below representing an open area -> represents looking over or through an unobstructed space
etymology.interpretation: The character 㕣 (miǎn, 'look over') visually conveys the idea of seeing into an open or unobstructed space, reminiscent of a valley, which aligns with its meaning of 'look over.' The space suggested by 八 and the open area signified by 口 communicate this concept effectively.
